notes: Methodology-only phase: no OHLCV/optional data loaded. regime_labels.csv and data-quality checks are out of scope here (data-dependent artifacts), produced only when data is present. SPEC.md is not required for a methodology-only phase; the regime-classification skill is the canonical-vocabulary and repository-defined-framework source of truth by design, and the existing-classifier-vs-SPEC discrepancy check is not applicable (no existing classifier to reconcile). research_db is read-only and was not used; work is file-based per regime-classification skill section 16 (MCP-down fallback). causal-auditor returned PASS on the classifier spec + pipeline + feature catalog. Not a git repository, so git_commit is n/a. Stage B (future-regime prediction) research design completed after Stage A (regime_prediction_research.md, regime_prediction_label_spec.md, regime_prediction_validation_plan.md): design-only (no data — no model trained/validated); auxiliary/probabilistic, never a current-regime label and never replaces the causal classifier.
